{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Forged rings
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Ziel]] can create [[Forged rings]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The echo of an [[Archlord]] uses [[Forged rings]] as weapons.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
